item.description: Yes that’s me on the box. This grizzled old dude was a child model in the 80’s. I am going to do a better job recreating the photo, but thought it would be fun to share.

item.title: Fuck bullies!! What a confident boost this would have been! Sharing because it's something I never saw before and thought it was worth sharing!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: It’s not meme theft, it’s meme recycling
item.description:
Please don’t explode while I pee
“Bodega rat” is a great term of endearment
For the last time I’m not moving to the desert
Best conversations happen in the wee hours at fast food restaurants
…but your pile is clearly just a pile
Smartest people I know are the best at retconning logic to supplant their emotional desires
Then you have kids, and all the toys are confusing for everyone.
God I love D&D memes. You’re lucky this isn’t a dump that’s full of them. Or unlucky, depending on your gaming habits.
Covid was the biggest experiment at being pulled out of the momentum of our lives, and asking if this is really trajectory we want to be on until the grave
I get it when folks light off fireworks in July, but why do you have to mess with my dog in February?
What happens when your kid doesn’t poop for 4 days then gets a dose of prunes
Bluey really is the best kids show I’ve seen. Legitimately has made me tear up. Most viral edit! Thanks everyone for upvoting and commenting. I’m always so impressed by the quality of this community. :)
item.dc:creator: medicinalwhiskey

item.title: My "Mom" is gone.
item.description: Earlier today, after returning from a trip to my Dr, I laid down to take a nap. A few minutes later, I was gdtting dozens of texts and attempted phone calls from a former foster sibling. She found her mother, my foster mother, dead in her apartment. I hadn't noticed all of the texts or other call attempts.. but for some reason, when I saw the caller ID for the time I did andwer, I was immediately filled with dread. I was supposed to go visit this part of my family for xmas, but I skipped the trip because I was feeling too lazy to travel while dealing with a foot injury. I probably could have traveled... but I didn't. I hadn't seen her in person for about two years now. And now I never will because I was too lazy to get on a plane with crutches. I don't know why i posted this. I will probably delete it. Guess I needed to vent
item.dc:creator: DrYuaTakeda

item.title: NYC's Voice of Transportation
item.description: Transportation journalist, radio personality, and voice artist Bernie Wagenblast of Cranford, New Jersey is one of the voices of the New York City subway system. After 15 years of being the voice, she came out as a transgender woman. “Hearing my old male voice really does not bother me,” she says.
item.dc:creator: 60SecondDocs

item.title: Chronic Illness things
item.dc:creator: VDoe1

item.title: Honestly pineapple, jalapenos and pepperoni are fantastic. You can switch it up with ham too.
item.dc:creator: archafuri

item.title: It is done! 15 years of teaching
item.description: Finally got student loan forgiveness under the Public Service Forgiveness program. Had to work in a high demand field at a low income school for 10 years and make 120 on time payment…done (Most viral edit) Thanks everyone, please support your teachers! We need all the help we can get.
item.dc:creator: Grayrune

item.title: No bro , don’t do it. Not this time.
item.dc:creator: ExistenceIsPainWasTaken

item.title: One day or day one? 360 Pounds gone!
item.description: I've lost 360 pounds since 2021 as of this week. March 1st is off to a great start. Want to hold myself accountable and create a timeline to keep myself on track. Thank you all who have been on this journey with me. I've gotten a ton of rewards and even got Imgur Emerald as a gift. Pretty awesome. Started off at 700 lbs (317.5 kg) and after finding a great endocrinologist I've lost 360 lbs (163 kg). I feel great. Can move and do things that were limited. I was not always 700 but even in my youth I had a weight issue. Undiagnosed vitamin deficiency that caused most food to never be used as energy. Now my body and metabolism are working better than ever. Here's to a new life. Have a great month. Καλό Μήνα! If you want to see more pics of my weight loss journey had to IG @AKosmidisJoint https://www.instagram.com/akosmidisjoint
item.dc:creator: AKosmidisJoint

item.title: Meme Dump 26 out of 200
item.description:
Heeey imgur ~ thanks for joining me again with another 11k meme folder dumparoo
Last time i rambled about being cold
Just to fill the void
It meant nothing
But some people took it a bit too seriously Q_Q
I promise im fine lol
Was just cold and feeling too lazy to do anything about it
Okay that's all ! Gonna get the meme train just flow and ride
Best sleeping position ^
Every time lol
It really does though lmao
Thanks for joining me for some memesssss Happy Friday and March 1st ♡ okay byyyyeee #memes #funny #memedump #mentalhealth #gaming
item.dc:creator: Orangefish

item.description:
https://youtube.com/shorts/WNh7SJgdIIo

item.title: They are all Gothic
item.description: Can we please stop gate-keeping? All styles should have the opportunity to develop and prosper and change somewhat over time. We all dress different on different days and occasions. Not all days are a full on make up/outfit day. Here's a few of my outfits from the previous months: https://imgur.com/a/EeVoP5h
item.dc:creator: Miiaka

item.title: I can't even.
item.description: After the death of a non binary student we get this, if anyone in the Tulsa Metro wants something to do next Wednesday counter protesting wouldn't be a bad way to spend a few hours. Wow first fp ever, be good to each other and stand up for those who can't.
item.dc:creator: PopeBruce

item.title: That does sound like a good gig
item.dc:creator: PiercedViking

item.title: Some love.
item.description: "Stuck overnight in a well at an NRT community conservancy, the trust this dehydrated and scared wild animal showed in his rescuers was beyond incredible. 100 litres of water later, lots of digging, pulling, 3 cars and the whole community behind him, the joint team managed to get him out and he walked away. Community ownership of wildlife works. Thank you to all those that helped!" Lewa Wildlife Conservancy. Video by Batian Craig
item.dc:creator: DontYouHateWhenAllUsernamesAreAlreadyTaken

item.description: FP edit! Send funny stuff. If you need someone to talk to - drop me a message! Check my little business! https://imgur.com/gallery/Hj66xXu A quick upvote would be more than helpful!

item.title: Hunter's majestic mane
item.description: Source: https://moringmark.tumblr.com/ I wanted to comment about why I sometimes use imgflip (as seen in the bottom left corner). I have tried posting the individual pages of this comic but Imgur often puts them out of order. I have tried editing in Imgur but am never given an option to move images. I have contacted Imgur about this issue and they have done nothing to rectify it. I upload the images in the order I want them to appear but they then shuffle themselves around.
item.dc:creator: LincLoud

item.title: Don't drink and drive, kids
item.description: I used to think he was just really uncoordinated, but it turns out it was all the booze... All joking aside, I'm so incredibly proud of him! If you or someone you know is struggling with addiction, don't be afraid to seek help https://www.aa.org/
item.dc:creator: ArizonaIceTea77

item.title: Finland says "Ukraine is free to bomb Russia with our weapons".
item.description: I can only congratulate our neighbours to the east for having the balls to nor restrict Ukraine's self defence against the attacking hordes of fascists... https://www.politico.eu/article/finland-ukraine-strike-russia-territory-provided-weapons-antti-hakkanen/
